summary: Iteration 18 - Bug Fix Verification Complete. All 4 critical bugs have been FIXED and verified: 1) Privacy e Legale links now navigate to /privacy page, 2) Elimina Account button shows confirmation dialog, 3) Esci dall'Account button shows confirmation dialog and logs out, 4) Language change now updates UI correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 critical bugs are now fixed. Testing verified: 1) Privacy/Terms/GDPR links navigate to /privacy page with full legal content, 2) Delete Account button shows confirmation dialog with Italian text, 3) Logout button shows confirmation dialog and redirects to login, 4) Language selector works and updates UI labels immediately after save, 5) Notifications toggle is clickable and triggers permission request

bug_1_privacy_links.description: Privacy e Legale section was not interactive
bug_1_privacy_links.verification: All 3 links (Informativa sulla Privacy, Termini di Servizio, Gestione Consensi GDPR) now navigate to /privacy page with full legal content including Terms & Conditions, Privacy Policy, Data Table, AI Transparency, and Rights sections

bug_2_delete_account_button.description: Elimina Account button was not working
bug_2_delete_account_button.verification: Button clicked and confirmation dialog appeared: 'Elimina Account - Sei sicuro di voler eliminare il tuo account? Questa azione è irreversibile.'

bug_3_logout_button.description: Esci dall'Account button was not working
bug_3_logout_button.verification: Button clicked, confirmation dialog appeared: 'Disconnetti - Vuoi uscire dal tuo account?', user logged out and redirected to /login page

bug_4_language_change.description: Language change was not applying modifications
bug_4_language_change.verification: Changed language from English to Italiano, clicked Save, UI updated to show Italian language selected with Italian flag. The setGlobalLanguage() is now called in saveSettings() function

bug_5_notifications_toggle.verification: Toggle switch is clickable, triggers permission request. Shows alert when permissions denied (expected behavior on web)

privacy_page_content_verified.title: Privacy e Termini
sections: Termini e Condizioni (expandable with full T&C content)
